x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Criteria
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Eligibility Criteria
- Who qualifies for cashback
- Account status requirements (active, verified, etc.)
- Eligible customers, employees, or partners

x-enumeration-literals.name: Qualifying Transactions
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Qualifying Transactions
- Types of purchases or activities that earn cashback
- Excluded transactions (fees, taxes, refunds, etc.)
- Minimum spend requirements

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Cashback Rate
- Percentage or fixed amount offered
- Tiered rates (e.g., 2% standard, 5% promotional)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Calculation Method
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Calculation Method
- How cashback is calculated
- Whether calculated before or after discounts/taxes
- Rounding rules

x-enumeration-literals.name: Crediting Terms
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Crediting Terms
- When cashback is credited (immediate, monthly, quarterly)
- Pending or approval period

x-enumeration-literals.name: Redemption Rules
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Redemption Rules
- Minimum redemption threshold
- Redemption method (bank transfer, voucher, account credit)
- Processing timelines

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expiry / Forfeiture
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Expiry / Forfeiture
- Expiration period
- Conditions under which cashback is cancelled

x-enumeration-literals.name: Caps and Limits
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Caps and Limits:
- Maximum cashback per transaction
- Monthly or annual limits

x-enumeration-literals.name: Modification and Termination
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Modification and Termination
- Right to amend terms
- Conditions for suspension or termination
